name: helixgen
description: Generate Line 6 Helix Stadium .hsp presets from JSON or natural-language tone descriptions. Bundles the /tone skill (drives prompts like '/tone Foo Fighters White Limo lead') and the helixgen MCP server (list-blocks, show-block, list-irs, generate). The helixgen + mcp_server code is bundled with the plugin and loaded from ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}; the MCP server launches via `uv`, which auto-provisions the `mcp` and `click` Python packages into an isolated env — requires `uv` on your PATH.
